articles.title: Oil Prices Surge as Middle East Tensions Escalate
articles.story: Global oil markets surged Friday as geopolitical tensions in the Middle East raised fears of disruptions to major energy supply routes. Analysts say shipping through the Strait of Hormuz could be affected if the conflict expands.

articles.title: World Leaders Urge Diplomacy to Prevent Wider Conflict
articles.story: Governments across Europe, Asia, and North America have called for urgent diplomatic efforts to prevent escalation in the Middle East crisis. Emergency meetings are being held to stabilize global security.

articles.title: Global Stock Markets React to Energy Uncertainty
articles.story: Stock markets showed mixed performance as investors reacted to rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions. Energy companies gained while airline and transport stocks faced pressure.

articles.title: Artificial Intelligence Investment Surges Worldwide
articles.story: Technology companies and governments are investing billions into AI infrastructure including advanced chips, new data centers, and research laboratories.

articles.title: Nations Prepare for Global Indoor Athletics Championship
articles.story: Athletes from more than 120 countries are preparing for the World Indoor Athletics Championships scheduled later this month in Poland.

articles.title: Winter Paralympic Games Enter Final Stage
articles.story: The 2026 Winter Paralympic Games in Italy are approaching the final events with athletes competing across alpine skiing, snowboarding, and ice sports.

articles.title: Parliament Debates Major Economic Reform Plan
articles.story: Lawmakers are debating a sweeping economic reform proposal aimed at reducing inflation and stabilizing national budgets amid global economic uncertainty.

articles.title: Global Health Agencies Strengthen Disease Monitoring
articles.story: International health organizations have expanded global monitoring networks to detect emerging diseases faster and improve pandemic preparedness.

articles.title: Major Film Studios Announce New Streaming Strategy
articles.story: Entertainment companies are adapting to changing viewer habits by expanding global streaming services and investing heavily in digital productions.

articles.title: New AI Regulations Proposed in Europe
articles.story: European lawmakers have proposed stricter regulations governing artificial intelligence development to address privacy, ethics, and data protection concerns.
